'''鈭歠-b-dh''' ('''kafabadh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wabble|wabble]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-b-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wabble|wabble]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-b-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kafabadh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifabadh|thifabadh]] || [[word:jifabadh|jifabadh]] || [[word:shifabadh|shifabadh]] || [[word:kifabadh|kifabadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufabadh|thuthufabadh]] || [[word:jujufabadh|jujufabadh]] || [[word:shushufabadh|shushufabadh]] || [[word:kukufabadh|kukufabadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufabadh|thufabadh]] || [[word:jufabadh|jufabadh]] || [[word:shufabadh|shufabadh]] || [[word:kufabadh|kufabadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufabadh|thufabadh]] || [[word:jufabadh|jufabadh]] || [[word:shufabadh|shufabadh]] || [[word:kufabadh|kufabadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefabadh|thefabadh]] || [[word:jefabadh|jefabadh]] || [[word:shefabadh|shefabadh]] || [[word:kefabadh|kefabadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofabadh|thothofabadh]] || [[word:jojofabadh|jojofabadh]] || [[word:shoshofabadh|shoshofabadh]] || [[word:kokofabadh|kokofabadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofabadh|thofabadh]] || [[word:jofabadh|jofabadh]] || [[word:shofabadh|shofabadh]] || [[word:kofabadh|kofabadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofabadh|thofabadh]] || [[word:jofabadh|jofabadh]] || [[word:shofabadh|shofabadh]] || [[word:kofabadh|kofabadh]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fabadh|fabadh]] || [[word:fabadh|fabadh]] || [[word:fabadh|fabadh]] || [[word:fabadh|fabadh]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fabadh|fabadh]] || [[word:fabadh|fabadh]] || [[word:fabadh|fabadh]] || [[word:fabadh|fabadh]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fabadh|fabadh]] || [[word:fabadh|fabadh]] || [[word:fabadh|fabadh]] || [[word:fabadh|fabadh]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fabadh|fabadh]] || [[word:fabadh|fabadh]] || [[word:fabadh|fabadh]] || [[word:fabadh|fabadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙fabadh|th忙fabadh]] || [[word:j忙fabadh|j忙fabadh]] || [[word:sh忙fabadh|sh忙fabadh]] || [[word:k忙fabadh|k忙fabadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafabadh|thathafabadh]] || [[word:jajafabadh|jajafabadh]] || [[word:shashafabadh|shashafabadh]] || [[word:kakafabadh|kakafabadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafabadh|thafabadh]] || [[word:jafabadh|jafabadh]] || [[word:shafabadh|shafabadh]] || [[word:kafabadh|kafabadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafabadh|thafabadh]] || [[word:jafabadh|jafabadh]] || [[word:shafabadh|shafabadh]] || [[word:kafabadh|kafabadh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafabadh|shafabadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafabadh|goshafabadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafabadh|gokishafabadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafabadhn眉|shafabadhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafabadhnkn眉|goshafabadhnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafabadhn眉|gokishafabadhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafabadhsh毛|shafabadhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafabadhnksh毛|goshafabadhnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafabadhsh毛|gokishafabadhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafabadhro|shafabadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafabadhnkro|goshafabadhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafabadhro|gokishafabadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafabadhmu|shafabadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafabadhnkmu|goshafabadhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafabadhmu|gokishafabadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafabadhsher|shafabadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafabadhnksher|goshafabadhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafabadhsher|gokishafabadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafabadhng|shafabadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafabadhnkng|goshafabadhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafabadhng|gokishafabadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafabadhya|shafabadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafabadhnkya|goshafabadhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafabadhya|gokishafabadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafabadhyam|shafabadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafabadhnkyam|goshafabadhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafabadhyam|gokishafabadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafabadhn眉sh毛|shafabadhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafabadhnkn眉sh毛|goshafabadhnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafabadhn眉sh毛|gokishafabadhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafabadhn眉ro|shafabadhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafabadhnkn眉ro|goshafabadhnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafabadhn眉ro|gokishafabadhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafabadhn眉mu|shafabadhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafabadhnkn眉mu|goshafabadhnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafabadhn眉mu|gokishafabadhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafabadhsh毛n眉|shafabadhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafabadhnksh毛n眉|goshafabadhnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafabadhsh毛n眉|gokishafabadhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafabadhsh毛ro|shafabadhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafabadhnksh毛ro|goshafabadhnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafabadhsh毛ro|gokishafabadhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafabadhsh毛mu|shafabadhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafabadhnksh毛mu|goshafabadhnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafabadhsh毛mu|gokishafabadhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafabadhron眉|shafabadhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafabadhnkron眉|goshafabadhnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafabadhron眉|gokishafabadhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafabadhrosh毛|shafabadhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafabadhnkrosh毛|goshafabadhnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafabadhrosh毛|gokishafabadhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafabadhromu|shafabadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafabadhnkromu|goshafabadhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafabadhromu|gokishafabadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafabadhmun眉|shafabadhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafabadhnkmun眉|goshafabadhnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafabadhmun眉|gokishafabadhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafabadhmush毛|shafabadhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafabadhnkmush毛|goshafabadhnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafabadhmush毛|gokishafabadhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafabadhmuro|shafabadhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafabadhnkmuro|goshafabadhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafabadhmuro|gokishafabadhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|b863984}}
